output_text: on Apple Silicon lets the CPU and GPU share the same physical memory without explicit copies, which changes how a local inference runtime should schedule quantized matrix multiplications during decode. A memory-bandwidth-bound decoder reads every weight once per token, so the dominant cost is where the weights live rather than raw arithmetic throughput. Keeping eight
